entries.summary: Web service 5xx error rate spiked to 12% for 240 minutes due to connection pool exhaustion
entries.root_cause: Database connection pool exhaustion. The backend connection pool reached capacity, preventing new connections from being established. Likely caused by either misconfigured max_connections setting (similar to May 10 incident where it was set to 10 instead of 50) or excessive long-running queries consuming all available connections without timeout enforcement. No connection pool depth monitoring existed to provide early warning.

entries.summary: CRM database connection pool exhausted for 31 minutes during business hours
entries.root_cause: A batch reporting job started at 14:00 and opened 200 long-running connections without timeouts, starving the OLTP workload. No Datadog monitor existed for connection pool depth.

entries.summary: Web service 5xx error rate spiked to 14% for 18 minutes
entries.root_cause: Connection pool exhaustion caused by a misconfigured max_connections setting introduced in deploy PR #38. Under moderate load the pool filled and upstream requests started failing with 503.
